title: Sun TV moves Madras High Court against Chennai Super Kings over use of Jailer, Coolie music in promo
description: Sun TV Network has moved the Madras High Court against the owner of IPL cricket team Chennai Super Kings (CSK) for copyright infringement over the alleged use of music, background scores and dialogues from the films Jailer, Jailer-2 and Coolie in a promotional video for the IPL 2026 jersey launch.The civil suit has been filed by Sun TV Network Limited against Chennai Super Kings Cricket Limited (CSKL) and three of its officials.
